### **Links**

Only Hotspot Editors and accounts with content editing permissions can add and manage Hotspot About links. 

There can only be one “Official Website” link. This link will be more prominently highlighted at the top of the hotspot content. 

You can have unlimited Hotspot links. Link Titles appear the same across all languages. We recommend using a short, descriptive title of the page in its default language. 

![](images/paste-11.png){fig-align="center"}
